x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Scheduling windows define constraints Now Assist FSM uses for AI-optimized dispatch. Without them AI cannot optimize for time and availability.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure scheduling windows and constraints in the FSM Dispatcher Workspace. Target: 5+ active scheduling windows covering your field agent availability patterns. Now Assist FSM uses scheduling windows for AI-optimized dispatch.
